a little about me

Who I am

I'm Shambhavi — a B.Tech graduate in AI & Data Science from Delhi Technical Campus, and someone who genuinely gets excited about data problems.

Over the past year or so, I've done four internships — including a stint at India's National Informatics Centre where I built dashboards that actual government teams relied on. I've cleaned 100,000+ messy records, automated reporting pipelines, and shipped ML models on real HR data.

I believe data is only useful when it drives real decisions — not just sits in a spreadsheet. That's the standard I hold my work to.

"I'm not just looking for a job — I want to be part of a team that cares about doing it right."
